visual_description: A man in a white shirt stands on a balcony, leaning on the railing and looking toward the right side of the frame. He appears to be gazing out into a dimly lit corridor or hallway with reflective surfaces and hanging translucent curtains. His posture is relaxed, and his head is slightly turned as he observes something off-camera.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a slightly breathy quality, speaking at a moderate pace with a neutral prosody.
